Aaron T. Reddix

messages.subject: TTI Veteran Housing Initiative - Permanent Supportive Housing Partnership LA
messages.content:
Hello,

I am Aaron T. Reddix, CEO of Total Transformation Inc. (TTI), an AI automation company and veteran housing initiative based in Los Angeles, CA (EIN: 32-0663781).

TTI is actively developing permanent supportive housing for homeless veterans in South Central Los Angeles. We are pursuing a portfolio of owner-finance multi-family properties and seeking federal partnership for SSVF, HUD-VASH, and GPD funding.

Our model:
- Acquire 4-8 unit properties in South Central LA via owner financing
- House 3-6 veterans per property with wraparound services
- Fund operations through SSVF and HUD-VASH vouchers
- Scale to 100+ housed veterans within 24 months

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how TTI can support your mission to end veteran homelessness in Los Angeles.

Available for a call any day this week.

Aaron T. Reddix
CEO - Total Transformation Inc.
(747) 301-8586 | ceomrreddix@gmail.com
877 E 43rd Pl, Los Angeles CA 90011

messages.subject: TTI x City of LA - AI Workforce Development + Veteran Housing Initiative
messages.content:
Hello,

I am Aaron T. Reddix, CEO of Total Transformation Inc. (TTI), an AI automation company and veteran housing initiative based in South Central Los Angeles (EIN: 32-0663781).

TTI is building two parallel missions:

1. AI WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT: Training South Central LA residents in AI automation skills and placing them in high-paying remote tech jobs - addressing the digital divide and creating economic mobility in underserved communities.

2. VETERAN HOUSING: Acquiring and operating permanent supportive housing for homeless veterans in Los Angeles - targeting 100+ housed veterans within 24 months.

We are seeking City of LA partnership for CDBG funding, workforce development grants, and housing acquisition support.

I would welcome 15 minutes with the appropriate department to explore partnership opportunities.

Aaron T. Reddix
CEO - Total Transformation Inc.
(747) 301-8586 | ceomrreddix@gmail.com
